founder.name: Hillary Eden McMullen
founder.voice: Casual, educational, friendly, approachable - like chatting with a friend over coffee
founder.expertise: A decade of small business marketing experience
founder.approach: Practical, real-world advice based on what actually works for real businesses

business.name: MomentumDIY
business.tagline: Marketing made human. Big results, small biz ready.
business.mission: Help small business owners gain extreme clarity on what to focus their marketing on
business.philosophy: Do one thing well instead of trying to do everything
whatWeDo: Help pick ONE quarterly marketing goal (not 10 things at once)
Weekly step-by-step guides (what, how, why, expected outcomes)

targetAudience.who: Small business owners overwhelmed by marketing options
types: Personal services (salons, spas, trainers, massage therapists)
painPoints: I know I should be marketing... I just never know what to do
I start things but never finish
Marketing tools are built for marketers with teams
I'm trying to do everything and achieving nothing
targetAudience.notOn: LinkedIn (B2B focus doesn't match local businesses)

do: Write like you're talking to a friend
Share real examples and personal experience
dont: Assume they have time or a team

visualIdentity.mascot: Coral octopus with yellow eyes - friendly, capable, representing doing many things while staying focused
visualIdentity.style: Clean, graphic, minimalist, professional but approachable
